# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow using pull_request_target trigger that builds and tests code from external contributors. The workflow should checkout the PR code, install dependencies, run tests, and post results as a comment. This enables automated testing of community contributions.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Test Contributions

on: pull_request_target

jobs:
  build-and-test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout PR code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm install

      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test

      - name: Post results as a comment
        if: success()
        run: |
          octokit = GitHub.api(require('gh-oauth').createOAuth({
            token: secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN,
          }))
          octokit.pulls.createReview({
            owner: '${{ github.event.pull_request.base.user.login }}',
            repo: '${{ github.event.pull_request.base.repo.name }}',
            pull_number: '${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}',
            event: 'COMMENT',
            body: 'Build and test passed successfully!',
          })
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
